semantic.role: End-to-end (E2E) test suite for the ArchSpine CLI pipeline using a mocked LLM provider. Validates that the CLI handles subcommands (scan, sync, etc.) correctly in a controlled environment.
responsibilities: Provides a temporary isolated workspace per test run temp directory.
Runs the built CLI as a child process with configurable arguments and a working directory.
Verifies that the CLI pipeline executes without errors and produces the expected output (stdout/stderr).
Tests the integration of core pipeline stages (scan, sync) with a mock LLM to avoid external dependencies.
Supports cleanup of temporary test directories after each test to avoid state leakage.
outOfScope: Production pipeline logic or business rules.
Real LLM provider communication or credential handling.
UI rendering or user interaction beyond CLI exit codes and stdout/stderr.
invariants: Test file name must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (satisfied).
CLI binary must be built before tests run (ensured by build script or CI step).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This file is part of the E2E test suite that validates the end-to-end behavior of the CLI pipeline using a mocked LLM. It isolates tests via temporary directories and child processes.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added as part of an E2E test suite expansion (37 tests across 7 files) to cover CLI commands including pipeline mock scenarios.
